opportunities.rationale: Gold near recent highs amid Iran risk and macro uncertainty; breakout above resistance on strong risk-off flows offers asymmetric upside.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Fade overreaction: enter long only if NFP spike reverses and price reclaims pre-data level
opportunities.rationale: Late-stage bull with modest VIX; NFP-driven overshoots often mean-revert if underlying growth and inflation surprises are not extreme.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Short-term long if NAS100 holds above 22200 after ADP and ISM Services; otherwise stand aside.
opportunities.rationale: Tech-heavy index suffering from AI scare trade; only trade if price action confirms buyers defending key support.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Fade initial overreaction to Eurozone flash CPI if DE40 moves >1.5% intraday then stabilizes intraday.
opportunities.rationale: German equities in moderate uptrend; Eurozone CPI is a key trigger for rates expectations and short-term index swings.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Long on sustained trade above 67 with Iran tension headlines; avoid if diplomatic de-escalation emerges.
opportunities.rationale: Oil prices supported by US-Iran risk; setup looks for continuation toward recent highs while controlling downside with tight CFD stop.
Key gauge of US manufacturing health at the start of the month; surprises can move yields and cyclicals ahead of jobs data.
Inflation print shapes ECB rate expectations; strong surprise could hurt equities and support EUR, and vice versa.

opportunities.event_name: US ADP Private Employment & ISM Services
opportunities.rationale: Key labor and services data ahead of NFP; may front-run jobs narrative and move risk assets sharply.

opportunities.event_name: Major AI Earnings: Broadcom (AVGO) and Marvell (MRVL)
opportunities.rationale: AI infrastructure bellwethers; large gaps likely. Best edges are in tightly risk-managed single-name trades or avoiding overexposure into prints.
Primary macro catalyst of the week; can reset Fed expectations and risk appetite. Volatility likely elevated across indices, FX, metals and even crypto.
